name: structured_placement
short_description: Write pblock constraints for structured placement
full_help:
structured_placement

Description: 
Write pblock constraints for structured placement

Syntax: 
structured_placement  [-file <arg>] [-force] [-apply]
                      [-pblock_height_limit <arg>] [-pblock_size_limit <arg>]
                      [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name                    Description
  -----------------------------------
  [-file]                 Pblock constraints file
                          Values: A filename with alphanumeric characters.
  [-force]                Overwrite existing file
  [-apply]                Apply the pblock constraints
  [-pblock_height_limit]  Maximum number of sites in a column
                          Default: 32
  [-pblock_size_limit]    Maximum number of sites in a PBlobk
                          Default: 80
  [-quiet]                Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]              Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
XDC, Methodology
